rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-heading text-white
rules.overlines: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-body font-semibold text-accent_gold

layout_rules.grid_strategy: Asymmetrical bento grids for features. Avoid uniform 3x3. Use col-span-2 for key features to break monotony. Grid items must be direct children of grid containers.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E3A8A] text-white hover:bg-[#0B1120] transition-all duration-300 py-4 px-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest border border-[#1E3A8A]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1E3A8A] text-[#1E3A8A] hover:bg-[#1E3A8A] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 py-4 px-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest
buttons.gold: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0B1120] hover:bg-[#b8952b] transition-all duration-300 py-4 px-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold

cards.services: Group hover effects, 1px border border-[#E5E7EB], p-8 lg:p-12, bg-white, flex flex-col justify-between. Avoid heavy shadows. Use pure HTML/Tailwind.
cards.projects: Image-heavy, aspect-[4/5] or 16/9 depending on grid position, dark gradient overlay from bottom (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 to-transparent), text appears on hover.

components.avatars: Use CSS-based initials with bg-[#1E3A8A] and text-white flex items-center justify-center rounded-full w-12 h-12 text-lg font-heading. DO NOT use external placeholder APIs.

hero.layout: Full screen (min-h-screen) relative container. Background image with deep navy/black gradient overlay (bg-black/50 to bg-[#1E3A8A]/40). Content vertically centered.
hero.elements: Overline: 'Barka Royal Homes'. H1: 'Building Dreams, Creating Lasting Value'. Subtitle: 'Living As You Are Pleased'. CTAs: Explore Projects (Primary), Contact Us (Secondary/White outline). Bottom edge: Animated stats bar (50+ Projects, 100% Satisfaction, 10+ Years, 5 States) using glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/10 border-t border-white/20).

about.layout: Split layout grid: Left sticky text area (Vision/Mission text), Right side a bento grid for 6 Core Values. Generous p-8 spacing on value cards.
about.elements: Values: Integrity, Quality & Excellence, Innovation, Safety & Compliance, Client-Centered Approach, Sustainability. Give 'Integrity' and 'Quality' col-span-2 if using a 2-col grid.

services.layout: The 'Technical Grid' border-collapse style. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-0. Each item has right/bottom border. No outer shadows.
services.elements: Construction Solutions, Property Development, Real Estate Management, Architectural Design, Consultancy Services, Investment Advisory. Use large 01-06 numbers in light gray as background watermarks.

projects_portfolio.layout: Filterable masonry or bento grid. 6 projects. Use framer-motion layout animations. Tab list for filters.
projects_portfolio.elements: Filters: All, Residential, Commercial, Completed, Design Phase. Project cards open a modal or expand on hover with full details.

why_choose_us.layout: Dark mode section (bg-[#0B1120] text-white). 6 differentiators on a bento grid. Use Aceternity 'Tracing Beam' inspired glowing borders (1px border-white/10 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50).
why_choose_us.elements: Cards with lucide-react icons in gold (#D4AF37).

testimonials.layout: Minimalist 3-column grid. Large typography quote marks in serif.
testimonials.elements: 5-star rating (lucide-react stars in gold), Client avatar (CSS initials), Name, Role.

cta.layout: Full width banner with a dark overlay and an architectural background image (use 'services_accent' image with bg-blend-multiply bg-[#1E3A8A]/90). Text huge and center.
cta.elements: Title: 'Ready to build your dream?'. Buttons: Schedule Consultation, View Portfolio.

contact.layout: 2 columns. Left: Large typography contact info (Phone, Email, Hours). Right: Clean form with bottom-border-only inputs (border-b border-gray-300 focus:border-[#1E3A8A], rounded-none, bg-transparent).
contact.elements: Form: Name, Email, Phone, Message, Submit Button. Contact Info: +234 906 924 2088.

footer.layout: Dark background (bg-[#0B1120]). 4 columns (Brand, Quick Links, Services, Newsletter). Massive typography logo 'BRHC' at the bottom as a watermark (text-[15vw] text-white/5 font-heading).

hero.description: Premium modern Nigerian-style luxury mansion at sunset

testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta-button"`).
implementation_instructions: Implement with pure HTML/Tailwind for structural marketing layouts. AVOID Shadcn Card for layout flexibility. Use framer-motion for scroll-triggered fades. Ensure all heading tags use the serif font (Playfair Display) with tight tracking. The app is in .js not .tsx.
